results.title: PetVivo Reports Financial and Operational Results for Fiscal 2026
results.description: MINNEAPOLIS, MN, US, June 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- PetVivo Holdings, Inc. (OTCQX: PETV) (OTCID: PETVW), in cooperation with its wholly-owned subsidiaries, Cosmeta Corp, PetVivo Animal Health, Inc. and PetVivo AI, Inc., a leading provider of medical devices and biomedical therapeutics for equines and companion animals, reported operational results for the fourth quarter of its fiscal year ended March 31, 2026, and financial results for the full fiscal year.

results.title: Firan Technology Group Corporation (“FTG”) Announces Grand Opening of Its New FTG Aerospace Hyderabad Facility
results.description: TORONTO, June 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Firan Technology Group Corporation (TSX: FTG) (OTCQX: FTGFF) today announced the opening of its Aerospace facility in Hyderabad, India.

results.title: Enbridge Inc. to Host Webcast to Discuss 2026 Second Quarter Results on July 31
results.description: CALGARY, AB, June 29, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - Enbridge Inc. (Enbridge or the Company) (TSX: ENB) (NYSE: ENB) will host a conference call and webcast on July 31, 2026, at 7 a.m. MT (9 a.m. ET) to provide a business update...

results.title: A rural Maine town’s only grocery store is headed to foreclosure auction
results.description: Walker Food Services — which purchased the Ashland grocery store in 2022 — lost it after defaulting on three mortgages.

results.title: Bitcoin Hits 21-Month Low: What’s Behind the Price Drop?
results.description: Bitcoin drops sharply as Federal Reserve policy, Inflation fears, Bitcoin ETFs outflows, and weak ETFs demand trigger major crypto market selloff

results.title: Walmart is selling a $170 grill with two side tables for $97
results.description: The Master Cook Charcoal Grill is on sale for 43% off right now at Walmart. Shoppers can enjoy convenient and simple grilling for under $100.
